name: Pizza Hot Dogs
recipeInstructions:
1. Split each hot dog and hot dog bun lengthwise.
2. Place the buns on a cookie sheet.
3. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese over the buns.
4. Place the split hot dogs on top of the buns.
5. Spread pizza sauce evenly over the hot dogs.
6. Sprinkle parmesan cheese over the sauce and hot dogs.
7. Broil until the cheese bubbles and the hot dogs are heated through.
Gretchen Barthold
